title: Overview
content: Senior Front-End Engineer & UI/UX Designer, experienced in building accessible, responsive web applications using React, TypeScript, and Figma. I bridge the gap between design and development, delivering clean, performant, and visually compelling interfaces. Strong foundation in accessibility, usability testing, and component-driven design systems. Passionate about crafting intuitive user experiences and efficient front-end architectures.

content.text: Technical Writing: Over six years' experience with technical writing and editing for various projects such as instructions, manuals, website content, API Endpoint documentation and multimedia presentations.

Communication: Articulate communicator adept at developing and delivering training and technical demonstrations. Consistent success contributing to cross-functional teams and exhibiting efficiency, quality, and flexibility managing and prioritizing project components.

content.title: Technology Tools
items: Languages & Frameworks: React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, PHP, ASP
UI & Design Tools: Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop, Illustrator, Framer Motion, Material UI
Development Tools: VS Code, Git, Node.js, NPM, Vite, Postman, Confluence, Jira
Other: Accessibility (WCAG 2.1), Responsive Design, Usability Testing, Agile, Technical Writing

content.title: 365 Retail Markets / FullCount
bullets: Designed and built touchscreen and support apps for senior living facilities using React + Material UI.
Created Figma prototypes and implemented accessible interfaces for diverse users.
Ensured WCAG-compliant layouts and optimized asset delivery for performance.
Wrote internal documentation and user guides improving dev team onboarding.
Advocated for design consistency and led UI reviews across Agile sprints.

content.title: Gaine Solutions
bullets: Designed and developed Angular/TypeScript web tools for enterprise data governance.
Built the Coperor Console app with reusable UI components and accessible layouts.
Produced Adobe XD prototypes and front-end guidelines for engineering teams.
Recognized for leadership in UX accessibility initiatives.
Stack: Angular, TypeScript, Material UI, Adobe XD, Jira, Confluence, Agile

content.title: Independent Consultant
bullets: Designed and developed websites and branding materials for clients including PSSC Labs, Ribbon, Artizen HPC, and others.

content.title: First American Title
bullets: Developed and maintained the “eTree” website for First American Document Solutions using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and ASP.

bullets: Built corporate intranet and external websites, and authored technical documentation and marketing materials.

content: Website Design Development, Website Development, User Interface Design, Graphic Design, Web Programming, Application Development, Content Management, Single-Page Web Applications, Prototyping, UI/UX Design, Web Accessibility, Debugging, Technical Writing, Marketing Strategy, Agile Scrum Team Planning

title: Accessibility
content: I am committed to building applications that meet WAI WCAG guidelines, Section 508 standards for accessibility on government and/or federally-funded applications, and in compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA).
